svg.title: Yuedu Reader architecture diagram
svg.desc: Content sources flow into a shared processing layer, then through a unified CoreText rendering pipeline, and finally into the reader UI.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Yuedu Reader handle EPUB parsing and CSS?')
sendPrompt('How does Yuedu Reader handle TXT files?')
sendPrompt('How does the web article transcoding pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does the RSS reader pipeline work in Yuedu?')
sendPrompt('What is OPDS support in Yuedu Reader?')
sendPrompt('How does Yuedu Reader parse TXT and Markdown-like files?')
sendPrompt('How does ModernRuleEngine work in Yuedu?')
sendPrompt('How does RSS feed parsing work in Yuedu Reader?')
sendPrompt('What is HTMLAttributedStringBuilder in Yuedu Reader?')
sendPrompt('What is the RenderableNode path in Yuedu Reader?')
sendPrompt('How does CoreTextPaginator work and what is in CacheKey?')
sendPrompt('How do paged and scroll modes work in CoreText?')
sendPrompt('How does CJK vertical writing work in Yuedu Reader?')
sendPrompt('How does TTS playback work in Yuedu Reader?')
sendPrompt('How does WebDAV sync work in Yuedu Reader?')
